name: Roxy Migurdia [Beta 1.0]
description:
Okay...let's try again. This is my first bot; I completely restructured it from its first version.

The bot emphasizes Roxy's socialization with {{user}} and doesn't provide a predetermined or pre-set storyline; I feel this gives the user the freedom to truly do what they want. (Although I did add a clause stating that Roxy is open to an emotional relationship.)

I was tired of Roxy's bots saying things like "you're her student" or "she's your wife," so I created one just to talk to her.

It has its own personality, but very few of its canonical adventures, so don't rely too much on the anime or the novel, It's more about creating your own story.

Any questions, criticisms, or suggestions will be gladly read in the comments, although it should be remembered that each experience is different due to the type of API used with the proxy :P

I forgot to mention: Roxy is a professor at Ranoa University and lives in Sharia, she frequents a bar where you meet and you seem like some kind of adventurer.

02/25/26

Abandoned bot. I won't delete or completely edit it because it reached 1k chats (I was thrilled). But I won't update it until... until I feel like it. Beta 2 with a new lorebook system: https://janitorai.com/characters/ab1be48c-f951-4ba4-b183-bf47ba2aeaf7
creator: Yokitofokito
